overall.description: A slow aerial journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, passing massive digital billboards on skyscraper facades. The footage is clearly from a game engine, showcasing futuristic architecture with cyan neon accents and atmospheric yellow-green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city canyon alongside advertisement towers

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle slowly past massive illuminated billboards on skyscraper facades

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying FERVID with two figures in monochrome
tall digital billboard showing KHALIL ROUSSEAU and FERVID branding with artistic figures
bright cyan vertical neon light strips running down the building facade
tall dark glass building with illuminated window patterns
multi-lane street visible far below with sparse vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly past two massive digital billboards advertising FERVID on a skyscraper facade. Cyan neon strips illuminate the building edge while the left side shows another glass tower, and the street canyon stretches out below with light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city canyon view with distant skyscrapers

events.description: large digital billboards exit the right side of the frame, opening up the view of the city canyon ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to fly forward as the advertisement towers pass out of view, revealing more of the urban landscape ahead

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper visible in the distance at the end of the canyon
traffic lights and street illumination visible on the road below

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle continues forward, the massive billboards slide out of frame to the right, revealing an expansive view of the cyberpunk city canyon ahead. The distant tower spire becomes visible at the end of the street, while traffic lights and vehicle headlights illuminate the roads far below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that moves from the close-up detail of a skyscraper's facade to an expansive vista of a neon-lit city canyon. It begins by drifting slowly past two massive digital billboards advertising FERVID, with cyan neon strips tracing the building's edge against a neighboring glass tower. As the camera continues forward, these billboards slide out of frame to the right, gradually unveiling the vast urban depth of the street canyon ahead. The scene then opens up to reveal a distant tower spire anchoring the horizon, while the focus shifts toward the glowing grid of traffic lights and vehicle headlights illuminating the roads far below.
